decision.summary: Close the expired 66k dip Yes remainder on stop-loss and keep the active 67k reach Yes position.
decision.rationale: The residual `will-bitcoin-dip-to-66k-on-march-28` `Yes` position is effectively dead at 0.0 probability and should be fully closed under the stop-loss rule. The active BTC position `will-bitcoin-reach-67k-on-march-29` `Yes` is around 53.7%, so it is neither a stop-loss nor a take-profit exit. Latest Beecthor context still favors a broader bearish continuation but allows a short squeeze/rebound into 67k-70k before larger downside, which keeps the 67k reach thesis alive with Binance spot at 66406.32. Un saludo a Zara Larsson.
